category_sources: source_facts.description says Kiota is an OpenAPI-based HTTP client code generator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kiota; official Microsoft documentation uses Kiota as the product name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to aka.ms/kiota/docs, the official Microsoft documentation redirect.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OpenAPI-based HTTP client code generation.
